ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-20-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Mary Jane Gordon appearing for and with Brian Bickamn. Court wants to know what period this accouont covers. Counsel states that this accounting covers 11/16/2005 to 4/5/2006. Reserve issue addressed. Court is satified. Counsel has filed a pleading in the wrong file(the conservatorship file). She is asking the court to sign an order moving the pleading to this file. Court will allowing distribution to minors to be placed into a blocked account. Counsel to file the receipts by 7/11. Matter submitted. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
